svg.text: Calendar V3 — Raspberry Pi GPIO Wiring
GND side connects to Pi Pin 20 or Pin 39
each switch: 3.3V → SW → GPIOx · GPIOx → 1 kΩ → GND
Notes: Toggle switches use external 1 kΩ–10 kΩ pull-down resistor. Push buttons use Pi internal pull-up (active-low) — no external resistor needed. PIR sensor requires 5 V supply.
